seoTitle: Round Hill vs Rowella — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Round Hill and Rowella. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Round Hill vs Rowella: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Round Hill and Rowella.
heading: Round Hill vs Rowella — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Round Hill, Tasmania and Rowella, Tasmania. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Round Hill has a lower overall climate risk score (29/100) compared to Rowella (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Round Hill or Rowella safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Round Hill has a flood risk score of 23/100, while Rowella scores 28/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Round Hill scores 16/100 for bushfire risk. Rowella scores 61/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Round Hill or Rowella?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Round Hill has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.35% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
